creator: crwhipp@gmail.com
text:
Attached patch to udpate astro/foxtrotgps to the latest version from upstream.  Current port is 1.1.0, upstream is 1.1.1.

Fix: Apply patch with:
#cd /usr/ports/astro
#patch < $PATH_TO_PATCH

Build port using desired method.

How-To-Repeat: Build astro/foxtrotgps, or evaluate version in Makefile.
